release_notes: V14.44 build 219 beta removes the duplicated Today and Yesterday totals from the bottom of the Carbs and insulin TFT screen because those totals are already shown in the four summary cards. The treatment-history panel is extended to the bottom of the display and now shows up to seven recent insulin/carbohydrate rows. The duplicate Show carbs and insulin screen button is removed from the insulin Web UI; the screen remains available under Patient & display > Display screen selector. All Build 218 Web UI cleanup, Build 217 daily history and carb widget, Build 212 native OTA safeguards and existing Nightscout, SAGE, alarm and WhatsApp functions are preserved.
